creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ruN bash/Makefile bash.orig/Makefile
--- bash/Makefile	2007-12-15 13:51:33.874892577 -0500
+++ bash.orig/Makefile	2007-12-15 13:38:05.939918718 -0500
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=		bash
-PATCHLEVEL=		33
+PATCHLEVEL=		25
 PORTVERSION=		3.2.${PATCHLEVEL:S/^0//g}
 PORTREVISION?=		0
 CATEGORIES=		shells
